description: DIAULOS connection-layer wire formats (fanos-diaulos): frame encodings, the constant-size AEAD cell, and the 1-RTT hybrid-KEM handshake derivation. Small formats are full hex; large ones are a labeled BLAKE3-256 digest under label 'FANOS-v1/diaulos-kat'. Pinned in fanos-diaulos/tests/conformance.rs.

frame.layout: ftype(1) then a per-type body, big-endian; the cell zero-pads after the frame

cell.layout: cnonce(8 LE) then ChaCha20-Poly1305(key, nonce = 4 zero bytes ++ 8-byte LE counter, frame ++ zero-pad to 1040)

handshake.pattern: KEMTLS / IK-KEM over hybrid X25519+ML-KEM-768; ClientHello = ephemeral_pk(1216) ++ ct_to_static(1120); ServerHello = ct_to_ephemeral(1120); session key = KDF(ss_static ++ ss_ephemeral ++ H(transcript))

kat.note: deterministic via fanos_pqcrypto::rng::SeedRng; pins the ML-KEM/X25519 primitive versions
